description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, deploy, and test_prod using the node:9 Docker image for the build and test jobs. Include a global before_script that runs 'gcloud version || true', installs the Google Cloud SDK if missing, sources its path, and installs json2yaml via 'npm i -g json2yaml', and a global after_script that removes temporary credential and config files. Add a 'build app' job in the build stage that runs 'npm install --progress=false' then 'npm run build' using node:9. Add a 'test app' job in the test stage that runs 'npm install --progress=false' then 'npm run test' using node:9. Add a 'deploy' job in the deploy stage that only runs on release tags and executes 'echo $GCP_APP_PRODUCTION_CONFIG > /tmp/gcp_app_config.json', 'json2yaml /tmp/gcp_app_config.json /tmp/app.yaml', 'echo $GCP_CREDENTIALS_PRODUCTION > /tmp/gcp_credentials_production.json', 'gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file /tmp/gcp_credentials_production.json', and 'gcloud --quiet --project $GCP_PROJECT_ID_PRODUCTION app deploy /tmp/app.yaml'. Add an 'e2e' job in the test_prod stage that only runs on release tags and runs 'echo "Run e2e tests after deployment"'.
